summary: Completed frontend testing for TYRELL flower shop. All 7 requested features are working correctly: image lightbox with navigation/counter/close, WhatsApp integration with default message for Ver Catálogo buttons, service-specific messages for PEDIR buttons, and carousel with navigation.

issues: Console warning: Empty string passed to src attribute for video element - may cause browser to download page again. Consider using null instead of empty string when video is not available.

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: In HeroSection.js line 48, empty src attribute passed to img fallback causes console warning. Consider conditionally rendering the img tag only when hero.image exists.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 user-requested features are working: 1) Image lightbox opens on service image click with navigation arrows, counter (e.g., '2/10'), and close button. 2) Auto-scroll carousel implemented with 5-second interval. 3) WhatsApp default message 'Hola Tyrell quisiera información sobre ...' works on Ver Catálogo buttons. 4) PEDIR buttons have service-specific messages. The services API returns real data from /api/content endpoint.

image_lightbox.details: Opens on service image click, shows navigation arrows, image counter (1/10), close button works

lightbox_navigation.details: Previous/Next arrows navigate through images, counter updates correctly

lightbox_close.details: Close button dismisses the lightbox modal

hero_whatsapp_link.details: Ver Catálogo button in hero links to wa.me with message 'Hola Tyrell quisiera información sobre ...'

services_whatsapp_link.details: Ver Catálogo Completo button links to wa.me with same default message

pedir_service_specific.details: PEDIR buttons link to wa.me with service-specific message like 'Hola Tyrell, necesito información sobre Ramos'

carousel_images.details: Services with multiple images show carousel with navigation dots and prev/next buttons on hover
